task: Now, I want you to do this: I do not want to work on the backend since I am someone who is more interested in data science and machine learning. This project gives me the opportunity to work in an area that is centered around finance and a bit of quantitative finance. The analytics engine that I want to build should be able to do everything as is outlined in @SRS.pdf . Basically when the user uses the app, he needs to be able to see the risk that he is exposed to in the future based on past financial data of the stocks/financial instruments. So I should be able to forecast risk for an individual instrument/entity, the entire user portfolio, a group of instruments as and when the user selects them. Based on this, I should also be able to optimize the portfolio for the user and generate a report for them based on the portfolio optimization performed. Now, I am completely new to this and want to get my hands dirty by building this. I have about 4 hours from now to build this. Hence, create a detailed roadmap with checkboxes that I can tick off. This roadmap should outline every task that I need to go ahead and complete to build this analytical engine and get it up and ready to be connected to the backend of the app. Outline the name of the task, what it aims to achieve, which file I need to work on and what to do. Do not miss any detail. Do not do the task for me, but guide me in doing it. Conform to the software requirement specifications as well when doing so. Create this as a separate file titled "engine_specs.md".
